name: Confidence
description: Composure, assertive delivery, and conviction in what you're saying.

name: Clarity
description: Clear, concise language. No jargon soup, no rambling, no filler.

name: Structure
description: A logical flow from open to hook to value to next step.

name: Discovery
description: Asking open-ended, revealing questions that uncover pain, process, and priority.

name: Objection Handling
description: Acknowledging, reframing, and resolving objections without getting defensive.

name: Active Listening
description: Responding to what the buyer actually said, not what you wanted them to say.

name: Closing Readiness
description: Asking for the next step clearly and without apology.
